programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Pidgey on a protected island don’t have to worry about being attacked, so most have lost interest in flying. But one of them still dreams of soaring beyond the stars! Can Ash and friends help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes pass a small mountain village just in time for the annual Chinchou migration. The village always sends Trainers to protect the Chinchou on their journey—but will they be enough to stop Team Rocket?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When a family’s home is threatened by the Corsola who live nearby, it’s Ash and friends to the rescue…and maybe Misty can finally catch that Corsola she’s been after!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After our heroes miss a ferry, they meet a diver who offers to take them to the next island…but they’re soon distracted by tales of treasure aboard a sunken ship!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When they’re not competing in the Whirl Cup, Ash and Misty try to help a young Trainer whose Octillery has been rejected by its Remoraid friends after evolving.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After winning their preliminary rounds, Ash and Misty face formidable opponents in the Whirl Cup. Meanwhile, the Team Rocket trio have their eyes on stealing the tournament’s prize!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: It’s the second round of the Whirl Cup, and Ash and Misty have been paired up against each other! Who will come out on top? And will Team Rocket’s plan to distract the police be successful?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes are asked to help protect a village from marauders who threaten to make off with the Diglett who live there—and thanks to a delicious dinner, Team Rocket offers to help, too!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a jewelry maker who tells them the legend of the fourth Whirl Island…and who soon finds himself embroiled in a Team Rocket plot!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: While two sets of Team Rocket villains set out to capture the Legendary Pokémon Lugia, Ash runs into his old friend Richie and his partner, a Pikachu named Sparky!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The farmyard boys feed their cows and calves and watch them grazing in a field. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa eat their Tubby Toast at the table, and Po eats her toast in her bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children playing with torches. In Teletubbyland, Po chases Tinky Winky, and Po catches him.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises & makes lovely roaring sounds, Dipsy & Laa-Laa laugh and run away. Some children pretend to be different animals and guess what they are. Tinky Winky hears a big roar and runs away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po pops up between Dipsy and Tinky Winky. They join Laa-Laa to watch two girls go for a tram ride around San Francisco. Laa-Laa and Po go for a walk. Laa-Laa goes the quick way and Po goes the long way.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say hello before they gather round to watch some children learn about the number nine. Po and Tinky Winky count nine flowers that appear in Teletubbyland and then run off to fin Dipsy and Laa-Laa and dance the Bump dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies appear one at a time to say ‘Eh-oh’. They watch some children playing with bubbles. It’s time for Tubby Custard. The custard machine makes a funny noise, and a tubby custard bubble comes out followed by more.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Daniel and Stephanie make big round pancakes. They are having a round and round day. They run round and round in Teletubbyland, but they stop to see the dancing bear in the Carousel, then there's time for one more dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a Spanish girl play her violin for her friends. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies watch Po dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love to eat Tubby Custard, but Po spills hers on the floor and the Noo-Noo cleans up the mess.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a magical, musical message for Po. The Teletubbies watch two children whose father is a lighthouse keeper, and learn that lighthouses have lots of steps.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel
programme.desc: The Princess goes on her very first vacation to the real world Hawaii. King Koopa and Kooky Von Koopa travel back in time to defeat the Mario Brothers.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: In the Amazon Jungle, Mario, using a plunger to swat his way through a variety of flora, leads Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool in their search for Dr. Sheldon, a mysterious witch doctor.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Adventures of Sherlock Mario
programme.desc: In Victoria, Mario and Luigi are riding atop a carriage being pulled by a horse traveling down a street in search of a great detective by the name of Herlock Solmes, with Toad and Princess Toadstool riding in the carriage.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: True Colors/Recycled Koopa
programme.desc: King Koopa drops paint on the Mushroom people, turning some red and others blue./The Koopa kids clean up the castle and dump all their junk into a warp pipe.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie
programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Greatest: Best of Season IV WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: We revisit the final table at season four's, Five Diamond World Poker Classic from Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Best of Season VII WPT Festa al Lago
programme.desc: We revisit the final table at season seven Festa al Lago.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Greatest: Best of Season V WPT North American Poker Classic
programme.desc: We revisit the final table at season five and the WPT North American Poker Classic from the Falls View casino in Niagara Falls.

programme.title: A Star is Born
programme.desc: A young woman comes to Hollywood with dreams of stardom, but achieves them only with the help of a man whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: The Cartier Affair
programme.desc: Curt Taylor is severely indebted to the top dog at California State Prison. After being released from jail, Curt takes a job as Cartier Rand's secretary to steal her jewels and settle his debt. Starring: Joan Collins, David Hasselhoff, Ed Lauter

programme.title: The Hunchback Of Notre Dame
programme.desc: In 15th-century Paris, the brother of the archdeacon plots with the gypsy king to foment a peasant revolt. Meanwhile, a freakish hunchback falls in love with the gypsy queen.

programme.title: Scott of the Antarctic: Scott of the Antarctic
programme.desc: The story of British explorer Robert Falcon Scott's 1912 expedition and his quest to be the first to reach the South Pole.

programme.title: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: The criminal exploits of Public Enemy number 1, George 'Machine-Gun' Kelly, during the 1930s.

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy.

programme.title: The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Action legends Jackie Chan and Arnold Schwarzenegger team up in this high concept fantasy historical epic. Set in the 18th century, English traveller Jonathan Green travels from Russia to China encountering dragons, black magic wizardry and a dragon king!

programme.title: American Exit
programme.desc: A dying father takes a road trip with his son, to try to rebuild his relationship before he dies.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: The personal ads of New York's trendiest magazines become the hunting ground for a bizarre killer whose calling card is a single, high heeled dancing shoe and one woman is determined to find out his true identity after the murder of her friend.

programme.title: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A vacationing romance novelist, Ellen Wilder, develops a crush on her hunky next door neighbor only to become the prime suspect when he turns up dead! With nowhere else to turn, Ellen begins to investigate on her own…

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: Two scientists are selected to travel across the universe to the source of a distant transmission and potential life.

programme.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space
programme.desc: One-of-a-kind alien invasion sci-fi featuring blood drinking alien clowns harvesting a small city.

programme.title: Area Q
programme.desc: After his son disappears a journalist goes to Brazil to investigate, where he discovers close encounter sightings that have taken place in a region known as Area Q, where he may uncover the mystery surrounding his son's disappearance.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Old Dog, New Tricks
programme.desc: Bryan Sr. resurrects an ancient crane dubbed Rust Bucket to complete a remote fishing cabin. Meanwhile, Beat struggles with two huge projects competing for time and square footage on the work yard.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cold War
programme.desc: In Kansas, tensions run high when Andre muscles in on Sam’s big build. And back at the log yard, winter gales put a chill on Peter’s enormous project for a Russian client.

programme.title: Timber Kings: A Big Deal
programme.desc: Joel pulls out all the stops, hoping his contract for four cabins in Michigan will land Pioneer an order for sixteen more. Meantime, Andre’s simple kitchen reno turns into a bigger deal than expected.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Pig in Mud
programme.desc: In the Prairies, Peter gets stuck in the mud, trying to make a client’s dreams come true. Meantime, Beat helps Sam with his biggest build ever, but a reckless rookie crane op threatens to bring the whole project down.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Richo owns a fleet of monster trucks that he has to get halfway across the continent.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In Perth, Steve Grahame is preparing for an epic journey.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silent Vow
programme.desc: A customer dies from poisoned wine dining at a café, and the waiter falls under suspicion because he was a former chemist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death and the Other Monkey
programme.desc: A cancer research scientist believes his test monkey was not only stolen, but also replaced. He is later found dead from gas; suicide or not?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Stolen Crime
programme.desc: A man demands to be arrested for murdering his wealthy wife whose death is attributed to natural causes. A valuable coin collection holds the answers.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silver Curtain
programme.desc: Behind the "silver curtain" spray from a fountain, a man is found dead with a knife in his back. Colonel March is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Error At Daybreak
programme.desc: A shady businessman collapses on an oceanside jetty, the apparent victim of a heart attack, but March discovers blood and a needle near the body.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Hot Money
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, the suspect, never out of sight, goes to his office where he locks himself in. But when the police search, there is no money!

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Missing Link
programme.desc: A skull, known as the Damascus man, is stolen from a museum and Colonel March's life is imperiled trying to solve the case.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: On October 1, 2000, 10-year-old Heather Thomas disappeared from her father’s Cloverdale townhouse. Ertmoed is arrested and confesses that he lured Heather into his apartment on the pretext of showing her pictures of birds and strangles her to death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mr. Big
programme.desc: On the evening of April 21, 2002, six weeks after being assaulted by her boyfriend Michael Bridges, and despite a restraining order against him, Erin Chorney is seen getting into a Ford Taurus known to belong to Bridges’ mother.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares, and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner Investigator
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Timothy Peart’s Last Dance
programme.desc: When a teen is killed at a party, police question the guests and wonder if they’re all part of a cover-up.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Polecat Flats/Hogules/Brain Boy
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield misadventures at a dude ranch./Orson imagines what Hogcules would do./Jon visits his cousin.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Maine Couse/First Aid Wade/Video Victim
programme.desc: The gang decide to keep a live lobster as a pet./Wade believes Orson and Roy are going to operate on his leg./Jon bets Garfield he can't go without TV for 24 hours.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Robodie/No Laughing Matter/The Attach of the Mutant Guppies
programme.desc: A mad scientist uses Odie as a model for a line of robot dogs./Aliens who have come to steal Earth's laughter./Garfield teases Nermal about giant mutant guppies.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Curse of Klopman/Mud Sweet Mud/Rainy Day Dreams
programme.desc: Garfield inherits the cursed diamond./The farm folk decide to clean up the place, Orson's waller becomes a prime objective./While Jon hosts a lady friend on a rainy day.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Basket Brawl/The Origin of Power Pig/Cactus Jake Rides Again
programme.desc: Jon, Odie & Nermal's attempt to go on a picnic./Orson tells how he became Power Pig./Cactus Jake moves in with Jon.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Binky Goes Bad/Barn of Fear/Screaming with Binky
programme.desc: A criminal disguises himself as Binky to commit crimes./Orson and crew must spend the night in the old barn./Binky visits an operating room.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Arrivaderci, Odie/Gort Goes Good/Feeling Feline
programme.desc: Garfield becomes guilt ridden when he believes he has caused Jon to get rid of Odie./One of Orson's older brothers decides to turn honest./Jon thinks he's acting too much like Garfield.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Bear Facts/Nothing To Be Afraid/The Big Talker
programme.desc: Garfield runs into a bear and Binky./The crew try to find one item that Wade will not be afraid of./Garfield makes a local talk show host regret his anti-cat comments.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Cactus Makes Perfect/Hogules 2/Crime and Nourishment
programme.desc: Jon, Garfield and Odie visit Cactus Jake./When Roy and Wade have a fight, Orson wonders what Hogcules would do./Garfield discovers a secret world inside a tree.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: TV of Tomorrow/Little Red Riding Egg/The Well Fed Feline
programme.desc: Jon buys a new TV set when his old one breaks./Orson decides to make his own movie./Animal activist thinks Garfield is starving.

programme.title: On the Case: A Slip of Fate
programme.desc: A woman is found clinging to the guardrail of a steep embankment. She tells police a harrowing story; two men had attacked her and her husband at gunpoint and now he is missing. Was it a robbery gone wrong or part of a far more sinister plot?

programme.title: On the Case: Devil in a Cowboy Hat
programme.desc: A young woman is found bound and strangled to death on the side of a road. As police retrace her final steps, they discover she was last seen being followed by a suspicious man in a cowboy hat.

programme.title: On the Case: Twice Is No Accident
programme.desc: When Fran Smith mysteriously disappears her sister and daughter mount their own investigation... What they uncover sends police on a cross country man hunt for a killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Lies
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, 41-year-old Nancy Menke, a mother of four, is found handcuffed and murdered in the passenger seat of her car; a records clerk in the insurance fraud unit stumbles upon a strange report that blows open Menke's murder case.

programme.title: On the Case: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: November 21, 1988, Sheriff's deputies received an alarming phone call from a convenience store in Leesville, Louisiana. A delivery person said the clerk who signs for deliveries was missing and the store's cash register was open and empty

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Time Of Death: Albert Walker
programme.desc: When a Devonshire fisherman hauled in his nets on July 28 1996, he made a gruesome discovery: among that day’s catch was a dead body. There was nothing to identify the man’s body except a Rolex watch and a small maple leaf tattoo on his hand.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Perfect Murder: Roger& David Cooper
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of two brothers who murdered a marketing manager on Christmas Eve 2014 using chloroform.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley
programme.desc: A double axe murderer and no clues - except tiny flakes of paint discovered deep in the wounds of one of the victims. This is a story of how forensic science - and the determination of one detective - found the killer.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Hitman And The Hairdresser: Fadi Nasri
programme.desc: A 29-year-old hairdresser was found brutally stabbed on her doorstep in a quiet suburban street of London. A recording of a threatening phone call seemed to suggest the motive, but every lead comes to a dead end.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Power and Passion

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death at Soho House
programme.desc: In the relationship between an Oscar-winner's son and his fashion designer girlfriend, one is found dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: A cell phone captures the murder of a Weight Watchers executive by a Wall Street lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preppy Killer
programme.desc: Robert Chambers speaks out after serving 15 years in prison for the 1986 murder of Jennifer Levin.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Secrets
programme.desc: The investigation into the 2008 murder of Juliana Redding, an aspiring actress and model and the subsequent trial. Redding was found dead in her Santa Monica, California home

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation in Texas
programme.desc: A report about the 2011 shooting death of Greg Williams, and the question of whether he was killed with his own gun by an intruder inside his suburban Dallas home - as his wife Michele Williams has claimed - or if Michele herself was guilty of the crime.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: When firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment, homicide detective Joe Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: After Andre Genestin's wife discovered he had been cheating on her, he murdered her and stored her body in a car roof box in the garden.

programme.title: Written In Blood

programme.title: Written In Blood

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1985, a young nurse is sexually assaulted by an unknown assailant, and she turns to law enforcement to catch this predator. Despite decades passing, she holds onto the hope that justice will be served.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens on the Moon

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Robin is desperate to meet her hunky, long-distance love in person. Nev and Max agree to help her hunt him down, but what they uncover turns out to be much more than Robin bargained for! (S6, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.desc: Sam and Joel help a man who is struggling to cope having found out he's been exposed to HIV, while Nic and Carla visit a lady who has a painful infected foot following surgery.

programme.desc: Tammy and Paul wed for eight years until their marriage ended. After nine months apart the couple secretly remarried, unbeknownst to their families, who would not approve. Weeks after saying "I do" a second time, the two are having doubts of their own.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Historian Michael Hesemann sought to authenticate the Titulus Crucis, believed to be a piece of Christ's cross. Displayed in a Rome church, it spans from Jerusalem to modern Rome, backed by records since the 1400s.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several independent researchers about the efforts of international bankers to control the course of history and enslave humanity through their monopoly of the creation of money and the manipulation of the money supply.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Wonders: What are Animals Saying?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders travels around the globe, where researchers are deciphering an amazing array of clues that reveal how animals share information critical to their survival.

programme.title: Wonders: What's Living in You?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders discovers a whole new paradigm for understanding how the human body works and opens up a new world of microbial forensics.

programme.title: scienceNOW: Can I Eat That?
programme.desc: What are the scientific secrets behind your favorite foods? David Pogue ventures into labs and kitchens to uncover the hidden truths behind the flavors and textures we take for granted every day.

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: It powers the machinery of nature; our weather, encourages and sustains life on land and at sea.

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: Military Machines: America in World War II

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The cabin of a 747 Combi begins filling with smoke. Crew members attempt to fight a fire in the cargo hold. After the plane disappears in the Indian Ocean, a recovery operation is launched.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Operation Ouch!

programme.title: Operation Ouch!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The little Lugia named Silver has fallen into the hands of Butch and Cassidy of Team Rocket, and with Richie's help, Ash must win the adult Lugia’s trust before it gets caught in the same trap!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the two Lugia from Team Rocket, Ash and friends have been taken prisoner! Now, they must figure out a way to escape…and to free the captured Pokémon as well!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When our heroes investigate a sudden pealing of bells, they discover that the Crystal Bells, which are said to ring only when the Legendary Pokémon Ho-Oh returns, are missing! The researcher Eusine seems to know something…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When Ash runs into his old rival Gary preparing to enter his Arcanine in a race, he decides to compete as well! But first, he’ll have to chase Team Rocket away from the Pokémon Day Care.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The moment has finally come: a Phanpy has hatched from Ash's Pokémon Egg! The little Pokémon is full of energy and soon charging off...with our heroes and Team Rocket in tow!

programme.title: Benji

programme.title: The Hero

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: The Pink Panther (1964)

programme.title: The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Action legends Jackie Chan and Arnold Schwarzenegger team up in this high concept fantasy historical epic. Set in the 18th century, English traveller Jonathan Green travels from Russia to China encountering dragons, black magic wizardry and a dragon king!

programme.title: Paths Of Glory
programme.desc: This powerful, fact-based absurdity-of-war film stars Kirk Douglas as a commanding officer who defends three scapegoats on trial for a failed offensive that occurred within the French Army in 1916.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A vacationing romance novelist, Ellen Wilder, develops a crush on her hunky next door neighbor only to become the prime suspect when he turns up dead! With nowhere else to turn, Ellen begins to investigate on her own…

programme.title: Twin Betrayal
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, mysterious things begin to happen. It's not long before Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her.

programme.title: My Son Is Innocent
programme.desc: After a brutal nighttime rape, police investigators zero in on teenager Eric Sutter. When the victim identifies Eric as her attacker, the legal system closes in on the boy as friends, neighbors and the media turn against him.

programme.title: Area Q
programme.desc: After his son disappears a journalist goes to Brazil to investigate, where he discovers close encounter sightings that have taken place in a region known as Area Q, where he may uncover the mystery surrounding his son's disappearance.

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: When expert hacker Tara tries to stop a powerful, sentient A.I. as it takes over the world's military, the A.I. marks her as a terrorist.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: Two scientists are selected to travel across the universe to the source of a distant transmission and potential life.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark King has to haul a monster rig to a coal mine 700km away.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Dougal Brett's road trains have to haul 1,500 cattle to a market nearly 3,000km away.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A team of truckers, husband and wife Mark and Clare Bolitho, bring their 16-year-old dog all the way to Adelaide; tensions rise at a Perth freight depot.

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: One driver's trip hinges on a single phone call to his mechanic.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Deadly Gift

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Lively Ghost
programme.desc: A phony spiritualist believes she's truly summoned a real ghost. Colonel March attends her séance to discover the identity of the spirit's killer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Sorcerer

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: At Night All Cats Are Gray
programme.desc: A lady claims an odd man is following her and fears for her life. She’s later found murdered...in mismatched color, a telling clue for the inspector.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.title: Rawhide

programme.desc: Mark gets involved in the legal problems of a friend (Mel Scott), a paroled ex-convict.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dire Straits
programme.desc: A college student in Staten Island meets a deceivingly charming man who sweeps her off her feet. But the relationship turns sour when his true nature is revealed.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play
programme.desc: Jane Haag rarely has time to date until she falls in love with Ron. But Jane discovers that Ron is a virtual time bomb about to explode.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Andrew Bagby, a Canadian medical student, starts dating fellow student Shirley. But, after Andrew accepts a job in the United States, Shirley isn't ready to let him go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Date with the Devil
programme.desc: When Ron Ruse breaks up with his controlling girlfriend, Linda, she vows to get him back at any cost. Soon, demands turn to death threats and Ron goes on the run.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Idol Worship
programme.desc: Jessica Sierra is excited to be an American Idol contestant. But when an obsessed fan starts calling non-stop, the thrill of fame turns to sheer terror when she receives disturbing threats.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Prisoner of Love
programme.desc: Katerina Brunot thinks she's met the man of her dreams in Frank Sheridan. But it all becomes a brutal nightmare when Frank turns her into his slave and frames her for a violent crime.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Vernetta is stalked by her abusive ex-husband, Richard, after she kicks him out of the house. When Richard threatens murder, Vernetta must face the fight of her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: When kickboxing champion Lee Redmond helps a woman in need, he finds himself the object of what could soon become a fatal attraction.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Campaign of Terror

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner Investigator

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial By Fire

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets

programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: Written In Blood

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder

programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the 1997 murder of Dawn Hacheney, whose husband set fire to their family home in Washington State, hoping the blaze would be treated as an accident.

programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the brutal murder of grandfather Peter McMahon, whose manipulative and controlling partner killed the retired civil servant in 2012 for financial gain.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Decades after the 1982 killing of Christina Castiglione, investigative genetic genealogy unmasks the predator responsible for her rape and murder in Redford Township, Michigan.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is out for a run she is brutally attacked and raped by a stranger. Police use groundbreaking genetic genealogy to identify the perpetrator.

programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Great Debate
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Facebooked
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But unfortunately they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mano-a-Mano
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Road Show: Where Mercy is Shown
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: So You Think You Can Date?
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hot Tub Grime Machine
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A-Jase-ent Living
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends. Then, what begins in the duck call room as a series of "Gentlemen's Bets".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process - including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms. Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack-O-Lantern
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Merry Christmas from Grandpa
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 1
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: To Touch The Moon
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Return of the Masked Rider
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 4
programme.desc: Previously sealed documents hint at compelling new theories about extraterrestrials. Could aliens be living among us? And could former US Presidents know something we don't?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Metal: Nations all over the world are rumoured to have found metal debris from UFO crashes. Join the investigation into the alleged wreckages of otherworldly crafts.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Alien Encyclopedia
programme.desc: Series investigating compelling UFO and alien cases by opening previously off-limits secret files. Does the mysterious Blue Planet Project hold the answers?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover how international governments investigate UFO sightings and the secrecy in which they shroud their findings.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 14
programme.desc: Alien Gods of Egypt. Experts scrutinise the engineering behind the Egyptians' Sphinx and pyramids. Could this advanced civilisation have received extra-terrestrial help?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: This episode investigates the claim that there is an alien presence already on Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Earth Portals: Experts unravel the secrets of the universe's earth portals: shortcuts through space that allow travellers to span vast distances in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Join us as we investigate the existence of UFOs and determine the possibility that they may be from Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Solar System UFOs: Discover the shocking truth about alien civilisations in our solar system. Check out derelict spacecrafts and explore the mysterious origins of UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Signs of Abduction: From loss of time and bizarre hazy memories, to terrifying accounts of alien surgery, these are the hidden signs of alien abduction.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Engagement
programme.desc: Alexis thwarts Blake's loan extension; Sammy Jo arrives in Denver to see her son; after quarreling with Alexis, Mark is found dead after a fall from her balcony.

programme.title: Dynasty: Disappearance
programme.desc: Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Mortgage
programme.desc: Steven accuses Adam of conspiring with Sammy Jo to kidnap Danny. Blake arranges to take out a mortgage on the mansion. He little suspects Alexis has signed the note and will become the owner if he defaults.

programme.title: Dynasty: Fallon
programme.desc: To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rescue
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a "friend". But they're perplexed when Jasmine drops a bombshell revelation: they've helped her friend before! (S6, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim & Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jasmine & Mike
programme.desc: Jasmine has been texting with Mike for two years and thinks he could be the perfect step-father for her son. Although they live only 15 minutes apart, the pair have yet to meet up in person.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Family Portrait
programme.desc: Leah and Jeremy rush Addie to the ER. Jenelle questions her future with Teen Mom 2. Briana lets DeVoin take a major step forward with Nova. Chelsea debates how to treat her anxiety. (S9, ep18)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Hey Girl Hey
programme.desc: Jade joins the cast of Teen Mom 2 but trust issues threaten an important anniversary with Sean. When Briana allows Devoin to take Nova for the weekend, he disappoints her in a big way. (S9, ep19)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Briana confronts Devoin in New York. Jade tries to smooth things over with Sean before moving into their new house. Leah and Kailyn vacation together in Costa Rica. (S9, ep20)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Direct Message
programme.desc: Leah faces another health scare with Addie. Jade and Sean reach boiling point, forcing her to move out. Briana is torn when she gets a suspicious DM about John. Adam surprises Aubree. (S9, ep21)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Leah's sister Victoria makes a shocking revelation, Jade finds out that Sean has been deceiving her, and Briana and John discuss their future while in the Dominican Republic. (S9, ep22)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: When Nova misses her dad, Briana puts her anger with DeVoin aside. Jade tries to distance herself from Sean. Leah's kids become suspicious of her possible romance with Jeremy. (S9, ep23)

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Fish Fight
programme.desc: For the tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, it's tournament time, and, with a big cash prize up for grabs, the fight is on to catch the biggest bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Shark Attack
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, are facing a dangerous new foe, with great white sharks swarming into local waters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sweet Smell of Revenge
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle droves of bumbling amateur fishermen in their bid to catch lucrative Atlantic Bluefin Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Storm Warning
programme.desc: A storm is racing towards the north Atlantic fishing grounds, but with time ticking away on the bluefin tuna season, the captains have no choice but to head out to fish in the rough weather.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: The team are called to a road accident where a woman has been cut from inside of her wrecked car.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11

programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team battles to save a man trapped in his overturned Land Rover on Rakino Island; a star rugby player at Onewhero may have broken his neck after a scrum collapsed, and a man out cycling on Waiheke is clinging to life after a cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: The chopper crewmen have their hands full with five badly injured patients after a car crash near Waiuku, and a massive motorcycle pile-up leaves injured bikers all over the road, and a man may have broken his neck after falling from his horse.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave's in Lincolnshire picking up a 1935 Riley Falcon - a good-looking saloon car, with a pre-select gearbox.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek brings a small army of military hardware to Thornton-le-Dale, including a Studebaker Weasel tracked vehicle and a WWII-era Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul collects a cherished 1924 Rover 9 that's been in the same family since the 1950s and only had one previous owner before that.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads north to pick up a 1954 Morgan +4 coupe in mint condition and believed to be just one of three still on the road.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Live
programme.desc: Highlights of a special event featuring an in-person auction. Derek and Dave aim to get the right price for a 1958 Jaguar XK 150, and there's a bidding war for a 1975 Yamaha Fizzy.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Chris and Tom go to the home of a young woman who is having suicidal thoughts and demonstrate how well trained they are at dealing with mental illness, as well as physical injury.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Ash and Jamie rush to a lady with severe chest pains who is losing consciousness, while Chris and Joel help a man with low kidney functions who has been picked up by the police.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Anna and Stuart head to the home of a former soldier who has fallen down some stairs and has a potential spinal injury. Jo and Laura treat a teenage boy having a seizure at college.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: V and Ollie race to a rugby pitch to help a man who has had a seizure, while Sam and Tom are called to the home of a three-year-old girl who's suffered an allergic reaction to yogurt.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Gaz and Lee blue light to a lady who has been involved in an incident with a bin lorry, while Simone and Claire are called to a pensioner who has fallen in her bedroom.

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested… Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Tony cheated on his wife Tiff and impregnated another woman. Now he’s denying both of their kids! Plus, more shocking tales of mad moms, denying dads and DNA drama!

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Renee believed her fiancé Picard was everything she dreamed of, but their dynamic shifted when he got a second chance in the music industry. She claims that Picard ignores her phone calls, blocks her on social media and vanishes for days at a time.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Auggie suspects her fiancée, CB, has been lying and stealing from her. CB claims she's been trying to put her best foot forward in regaining Auggie's trust but doesn't seem to be making any progress.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Shanikwa received a message 4 years ago from a guy named Matthew, purporting to be related to her and they instantly bonded. But Matt's father doesn't believe Shanikwa is related to them.

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Rosie is certain that her boyfriend and her mother are sleeping together; dance sensation Thick & Fabulous show how they handle trolls and haters.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Fiance Sleep With My Uncle for Money?
programme.desc: Did Ray cheat on Ashley while she was pregnant with his baby and have a secret threesome? Then, is Jason's fiancé Tasha sleeping with his own uncle Sonny for money?

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10

programme.desc: Things are far from simple for the recovery crews this week. When a loaded HGV suffers a puncture on a busy motorway, Crouch recovery op Jim Howard and heavy vehicle mechanic Jack Watson, are called to the scene.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A digger has fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken down trailer back safely to it

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What makes a good wife? Is it cooking, cleaning, raising the kids and having great sex? Dr. Phil says too few couples understand what it means to be a "Mrs." He delves into the role of the wife in 2005.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Police called it one of worst crimes ever. A boy held captive under the stairs. Jordan Bleimeyer, 5, was starved and abused. His stepmother, Tammi Bleimeyer, now behind bars, denied hurting Jordan but her children reveal how they saved Jordan's life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Faith and spirituality usually bring families together. However, one family says they've been torn apart. Chelsea, her sister Tara, and her mom, Linda, claim their beloved, Amy, who claims to be "Mother God" is now allegedly a "cult leader". Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Could you be raising a spoiled brat? Dr. Phil, along with Betsy Brown Braun, author of You're Not the Boss of Me, shows you how to tame your child's meltdowns. First up, Vanesa and Xavier say they can't handle their 4-year-old son Noah and his tantrums.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Taylor drinks hard liquor until she "feels it", smokes weed & an e-cigarette every day, & says she's not going to stop. Father Troy has given up, and their mother says she doesn't know where she went wrong. Dr. Phil helps this family figure it out.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Valerie says daughter, Alyssa, 19, is a lazy mom refusing to get a job & falls asleep on the couch, leaving her baby unattended. And actor Antonia Sabato Jr. discusses his campaign for a new law banning medical marijuana in homes with children under 18.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil peels back the curtain on cheating spouses when he talks to six women from the online group Mistresses Anonymous. Plus, learn how to inoculate your relationship from infidelity with Dr. Phil's tips! Part 1

programme.desc: There’s a mock election in Mr. Ratburn's class, but Muffy takes it seriously. How far will she go to win? Francine can't believe it. She gets in trouble no matter what she does -- thanks to the new nosy next-door neighbor!

programme.title: Arthur: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train

programme.title: Arthur: The Contest/Prove It

programme.title: Arthur: Summer Stories

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Lost Tanks of D-Day
programme.desc: In Normandy, June 6, 1944, a dozen Sherman tanks equipped with floats, the famous Duplex Drives (DD), leave their ship to swim to Omaha Beach... not all of them make it.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Last Flight of the B-17
programme.desc: Twenty-six metres beneath the waves at the foot of the majestic Calvi Citadel in Corsica lies an American plane from the Second World War.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: Secret Bunkers of Omaha Beach
programme.desc: On June 6th 1944, Lieutenant-colonel Rudder’s Rangers company climbs the cliffs of the Pointe du Hoc in Normandy with the mission to destroy the German cannons.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Tragic Sinking of Leopoldville
programme.desc: On the 24th of December 1944, 2 237 American soldiers of the 66th Infantry Division are aboard the Steamer Léopoldville.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 1 - Key planes of the Luftwaffe in WW2 included the Messerschmitt Bf 109, a versatile and widely used fighter; the Focke-Wulf Fw 190, known for its firepower and agility; and the Junkers Ju 87 Stuka, a prominent dive bomber.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Rare newsreel and amateur footage, newly colorised, take us inside Hitler's crumbling empire and onto the front lines of the firefight for the streets of Berlin, a battle that will determine the fate of World War II.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Civilians On The Battlefield
programme.desc: Experts look at three types of weapon employed to attack civilian populations, from the medieval trebuchet to modern bio-weapons and nuclear bombs.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: In the 19th century, weapons became more sophisticated and more deadly, and the results were higher casualties with devastating wounds.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942
programme.desc: The Gates of Hell 1941-1942: In the shadow of the war, the Nazi regime gradually advances its "final solution to the Jewish problem", culminating in the Holocaust.

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy
programme.desc: In spectacular experiments, a team of international experts presents the most significant cases in the history of weapons where speed has made a decisive difference.

programme.title: CROCS OF KATUMA
